text: Multi-tasking, creative, and passionately driven CTO / AI Researcher with 13+ years of experience leading global engineering teams across the USA, France, Singapore, KSA, and UAE. I architect highly scalable, modular monolithic, serverless, event-driven and microservices-based enterprise platforms, streaming data systems, web/mobile applications, AI driven SaaS products, and Multi-Agent Systems—always selecting the most fitting technology stack for the job. Certified in microservices architecture and backed by a Master's in Artificial Intelligence from the University of Liverpool, I bridge cutting-edge research with real-world product delivery. My expertise extends into emerging frontiers including Quantum Computing and Quantum Machine Learning (QML), complemented by hands-on exposure to game development, which adds a creative dimension to my engineering approach. I bring deep compliance knowledge across GDPR, HIPAA, SOC2, and ISO standards, with proven success in healthcare, fintech, e-commerce, ed-tech, and SaaS domains, alongside seamless enterprise integrations (HRIS, SSO, LTI). A self-initiator at heart, I thrive on continuous learning, adaptation, and driving digital transformation in high-growth environments—turning complex challenges into scalable, secure, and impactful solutions.
